ogTitle: Glengarry West vs Glengower: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Glengarry West and Glengower.
heading: Glengarry West vs Glengower — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Glengarry West, Victoria and Glengower, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Glengower has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Glengarry West (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Glengarry West or Glengower safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Glengarry West has a flood risk score of 21/100, while Glengower scores 42/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Glengarry West scores 45/100 for bushfire risk. Glengower scores 16/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Glengarry West or Glengower?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Glengower has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.15% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
